scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n web,api -c auto "npm:dev:web" "npm:dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/api run build
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/web run lint && npm -w apps/api run lint
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm -w apps/web run test:run && npm -w apps/api run test
scripts.migrate: npm -w apps/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.seed: npm -w apps/api exec prisma db seed
